This e-book was optimized for the presentation on as many common reading devices as possible.

file: Sales and Operations Planning with SAP IBP __ Copy 8u9n-5qxc-frpv-bwy3.pdf
title: Sales and Operations Planning with SAP IBP
overview: For those of us who don’t spend our working day immersed in strategic and tactical planning and who haven’t performed S&OP processes time and time again, the past few years have been enlightening. We’ve all suffered from supply chain problems, whether it was trying to find hand sanitizer in April 2020, attempting to buy home exercise equipment in June 2021, or searching for a particular brand of cat food in late 2022. We’ve come to appreciate the complexities of predicting and aligning supply, demand, and the financial planning that goes along with them.
